path.description: Vault root, relative to the repo root. Obsidian is pointed here.

name.description: Human name of the vault, used in seeded schema.md/index.md/log.md.

sources.description: Registry of upstream systems knowledge is pulled from. Origins not registered here can still be ingested via paste/file.

name.description: Free-form origin name (e.g. github, slack, google-docs, meeting-artifacts).

interface.description: How to reach it. Preference order mcp > cli > api; api requires apiDocsUrl.

mcpServer.description: MCP server name, when interface is mcp.

cli.description: CLI executable, when interface is cli.

apiDocsUrl.description: Public API documentation URL. Required when interface is api.

notes.description: Free-form access/auth constraints worth knowing at refresh time.

defaultTtlDays.description: Days after `updated` before a note without review_after flags needs-review.

ttlDays.description: Per-note-type TTL overrides, keyed by front-matter type.

cadence.description: How often the validate lint is expected to run.

checkUpstream.description: Whether validate re-checks upstream version markers via the sources registry (push detection), in addition to TTLs.

tier.description: Current index tier; consolidate proposes tiering up.

searchTool.description: Optional local search tool; markdown indexes stay canonical regardless.
